text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is almost here. Satono
Diamond has broken the Satono family's jinx with
a powerful victory in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stage shifts to the autumn Tenno Sho.
Unfortunately, it's taking place in the worst
weather on record, being held in the middle of a
storm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black, however, isn't fazed. Unwavering,
she charges into the race for the sake of the fans
who braved the elements to see her run.
